name: Boxing
justification: Decades of punch-velocity and heart-rate telemetry from Olympic and Pro camps.

name: MMA
justification: UFC PI data tracks 500+ elite fighters using Omegawave and Kistler force plates.

name: Wrestling
justification: Olympic physiological profiles show highest average anaerobic power-to-weight ratios.

name: Muay Thai
justification: Impact sensor data tracks bone-density adaptation and extreme metabolic turnover.

name: Judo
justification: Kinematic analysis of high-velocity redirection and rotational force production.

name: BJJ
justification: Biomechanical analysis of non-linear isometric holds and multi-planar transitions.

name: Rugby Union
justification: GPS micro-telemetry tracks collision G-loads and repeated-sprint exhaustion.

name: Ice Hockey
justification: On-ice metabolic tracking shows extreme VO2 output combined with rapid visual reaction.

name: Gymnastics (Artistic)
justification: Absolute gold-standard for pound-for-pound force production and spatial DoF.

name: F1 Racing
justification: Biometric sensors track sustained 160-180 BPM heart rates under 5G neck-loads.
